title: TypeScript package runnable adapters and conformance
goal: Implement GitHub #822 and #823 together: derive generated TypeScript conformance from command conformance_refs, then promote the Planning and Memory generated TypeScript packages from metadata-only fixtures to runnable read-only adapters.

The lane is complete when planning-cli and memory-cli generated TypeScript packages expose runnable read-only entrypoints, hand off to the canonical package runtimes, and pass local plus Docker conformance through the generated-package checks.
non_goals: Do not promote the root TypeScript adapter to weak-agent-safe; GitHub #824 stays deferred.
Do not add mutation-capable TypeScript adapters.
Do not relocate generated Python adapters under generated/python; GitHub #661 stays deferred.
Do not publish packages or change release packaging beyond generated package metadata needed for local proof.

intent.outcome: Generated TypeScript planning-cli and memory-cli read-only adapters are runnable, and generated TypeScript conformance is contract-derived instead of manually mirrored.
intent.constraints: Keep scope bounded to GitHub #822 and #823 plus generated outputs and focused proof updates.
intent.latitude: Use bounded evidence-backed improvements that make generation, proof, or agent operation cheaper and safer; report incidental dogfooding findings even when not fixed.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, requires mutation semantics, changes package publishing policy, or attempts to close GitHub #824.

execution.next_step: Inspect src/agentic_workspace/contracts/command_package_ir.json, packages/command-generation/src/agentic_command_generation/generator.py, and scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py, then implement the first coherent slice: derive generated-package conformance cases from command conformance_refs without changing TypeScript package maturity yet.
execution.proof: Generated command packages regenerate cleanly and generated-package conformance still passes for the current runnable TypeScript root adapter.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: TypeScript command generation can produce runnable, proof-backed package-local adapters without hand-maintained conformance mirrors.

iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Weak-agent-safe root TypeScript adapter promotion remains deferred to GitHub #824.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: static, local Node conformance, compact Docker package, compact Docker conformance, workspace tests, workspace lint, Planning surfaces, Planning doctor, and reconcile proof passed for the current slice
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: current milestone validation remains pending for runnable planning-cli and memory-cli promotion
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: promote generated/typescript/planning-cli and generated/typescript/memory-cli from metadata-proof-fixture to runnable-read-only-adapter with package-specific runtime handoff

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Generated command package IR, TypeScript generator/checker surfaces, generated TypeScript planning/memory packages, generated mirrors touched by regeneration, focused tests/proofs, and this planning state.
execution_bounds.max changed files: About 20 files; stop and reassess if implementation needs broad architectural rewrites outside generation/proof surfaces.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python scripts/check/run_generated_command_package_proof.py --all --timeout-seconds 300; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before introducing a new runtime abstraction, changing command semantics, or promoting weak-agent-safe behavior.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated roadmap candidates, publishing/release automation, external host repos, or mutation-capable CLI behavior.

execution_run.what happened: Promoted the roadmap lane, repaired the scaffolded execplan into a concrete active plan, and implemented the first bounded product slice by deriving runnable TypeScript conformance coverage from command_package_ir.json conformance_refs.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. closure_check.why this decision is honest: The conformance derivation slice is complete and proven, but the lane completion criteria still include runnable planning-cli and memory-cli TypeScript adapters.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py now selects runnable TypeScript conformance refs from command_package_ir.json before checker coverage is accepted.
closure_check.reopen trigger: If a runnable TypeScript target or command conformance_ref is added without a checker case, generated-package conformance should fail.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals found: Compact summary and proof detail commands still show bare companion CLI invocations in some fields despite repo-local CLI policy.
Docker proof output was noisy enough that a compact wrapper would reduce agent parsing cost.
signals routed: Bare companion CLI invocation drift is tracked as GitHub #826.
